steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content: A yearly decrease of $3.5\%$ means the population keeps $100\%-3.5\%=96.5\%$ of the previous year's value. As a decimal, the multiplier is $0.965$.

steps.title: Count the years
steps.content: From 2005 to 2015 is $10$ years, so the multiplier is applied $10$ times.

steps.title: Build the expression
steps.content: Starting from $6.22$ pheasants per mile, the 2015 estimate is $6.22(0.965)^{10}$. The result matches.
